lines.speaker: Esther
lines.text: Are you here to fight the cold?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Umm... I guess?

lines.speaker: Esther
lines.text: Great! Ask me anything you like about the Bruma tree, I'm an expert.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about the Wintertodt.

lines.speaker: Esther
lines.text: Some would say that ice preserves while fire destroys, but no amount of fire is destroying the Wintertodt. That's a cold that will freeze the air in your lungs.

lines.speaker: Esther
lines.text: Even the heat generated from burning the Bruma roots only weakens it, and that doesn't last very long nowadays.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Looks like an angry snow storm to me...

lines.speaker: Esther
lines.text: What you see in that pit is not the Wintertodt at full strength. It never will be while the Bruma tree still burns and the Doors of Dinh remain closed.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about the Bruma tree.

lines.speaker: Esther
lines.text: The Bruma tree is what keeps the Wintertodt weak. The prison was built here by Dinh because of its usefulness against the Wintertodt.

lines.speaker: Esther
lines.text: Some legends say that Xeric is the cause for the Doors weakening, or maybe he made the Wintertodt stronger?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is Xeric really such a bad guy?

lines.speaker: Esther
lines.text: It's a known fact that he was interested in the Bruma tree. For what purpose... there are only rumours.

lines.speaker: Esther
lines.text: Regardless, the Bruma tree definitely contains powerful magic. I've been studying the sap for years and it has truly astounding properties.

lines.speaker: Esther
lines.text: There's not many fires that burn green now, are there?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What about gnomish fire lighters?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about yourself.

lines.speaker: Esther
lines.text: Me? I'm a member of the Woodcutting Guild. More of a researcher though... I'm currently tasked with growing a new Bruma tree.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How's that going?

lines.speaker: Esther
lines.text: Poorly. I believe the Bruma tree can only be grown in a freezing cold climate.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, isn't that here?

lines.speaker: Esther
lines.text: It's just an idea really. For all I know, it could be magic way beyond me, beyond even the Pyromancers.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: See you later.

lines.speaker: Esther
lines.text: Goodbye!
